name: v5.5 — Enterprise Command Center
ceo_brief: Founder directive: max Pro plan barely used. Expand to 20+ parallel agents. Build real enterprise dashboard (SSE live updates, agent comms, branch states, cost burn). Git branch-per-agent model. Playwright monitoring. New agent roles.

items.title: Enterprise Dashboard — SSE Live Feed
items.description: SSE endpoint GET /api/v5/stream live-streams all events. Dashboard /live page with auto-reconnect, event type filter, refresh signal banner. POST /api/v5/dashboard/refresh-signal.

items.title: Git Branch-Per-Agent Model
items.description: GitBranchManager: createBranch(agentId,taskId), submitForReview, mergeBranch, markConflict, deleteBranch, report. MergeQueueItem lifecycle. REST: /api/v5/branches, /api/v5/merge-queue. New agents: merge-controller, conflict-resolver, code-reviewer, git-ops-engineer.

items.title: 20-Agent Parallel Fleet Expansion
items.description: AgentPool class: maxConcurrent=20, async acquire/release, queue depth tracking. WorkflowRunner already supports unlimited fan-out. BudgetEnforcer daily ceiling configurable.

items.title: Playwright Dashboard Monitor
items.description: scripts/dashboard-monitor.ts: headless Chromium + SSE watcher. Sends refresh signal on stale detection. API-only fallback if Playwright unavailable.

items.title: Dashboard Navigation + Homepage Upgrade
items.description: Sidebar nav updated with Live Feed + Branches links. Homepage rebuilt as enterprise command center: health check, quick stats, navigation cards.

items.title: v5.5 Release
items.description: Bumped to 5.5.0. 2965 tests passing (46 new). All P0 gates passed.
